meta.title: geo-seo-opencode | Ezequiel Fernández, Full Stack Developer

header.title: geo-seo-opencode
header.short: Open-source adaptation of geo-seo-claude (8.3k ⭐) for opencode. 16 GEO analysis skills, Python scripts, cross-platform installer. Optimization for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Gemini.

summary.heading: Summary
summary.text: Open-source adaptation of geo-seo-claude (8.3k ⭐) for opencode. 16 GEO analysis skills, Python scripts, cross-platform installer. Optimization for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Gemini.

problem.heading: The Problem
problem.text: Websites need to be visible not only on Google, but also on AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity. Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is a new discipline and there was no toolkit for developers using opencode.

solution.heading: The Solution
list: Complete adaptation of geo-seo-claude (8.3k stars) for the opencode ecosystem
16 analysis skills: citability, crawlers, schema, content, brand mentions
Cross-platform installer (Linux, macOS, Windows Git Bash) with a single command
Composite GEO Score (0-100) with 6 weighted categories
Professional Markdown and PDF reports ready for clients

architecture.heading: Architecture & Adaptation
list: Agent model: Claude Code uses slash commands (/geo audit), opencode uses natural language. The geo-agent registers as a sub-agent and the orchestrator detects GEO intent by context.
Skills as independent units: each of the 16 skills is self-contained with its own SKILL.md, Python scripts and isolated dependencies in venv.
Cross-platform: the installer detects the OS, uses native Python venv, and handles path differences between Linux (shebangs), macOS (Homebrew) and Windows (Git Bash).
MIT License compliance: full attribution to the original author (Zubair Trabzada), same open source spirit.

implementation.heading: Featured implementation
implementation.hookDescription: The installer automatically configures opencode.json to authorize the geo-agent, which registers as a sub-agent of the orchestrator. opencode detects GEO intent by context in natural language and delegates to the specialized agent.

accessibility.heading: Accessibility
list: CLI tool, no visual interface, all interaction is through the terminal.
Colors in output respect terminals with and without color support (--no-color flag).
Clear error messages with actionable suggestions.

performance.heading: Performance
list: Crawler scans and brand mention checks run in parallel via sub-agents.
Audit result caching to avoid unnecessary rescans.
PDF reports generated on demand with pandoc + headless Chrome.

challenges.heading: Challenges Solved
list: Path resolution: Python scripts reference files relative to the skill. The installer patches shebangs and paths so they work from any directory.
Dependency isolation: each skill uses a shared venv at ~/.config/opencode/skills/geo/.venv/, without polluting the system Python.
Auto-discovery: opencode scans ~/.config/opencode/skills/ and registers skills automatically. Zero manual configuration.
Automatic setup: the installer modifies opencode.json to authorize the geo-agent, without the user touching configuration files.

improvements.heading: What could be improved
list: Add more AI search platforms (Grok, Copilot, You.com).
Support for automatic periodic audits with cron.
Optional web dashboard for historical results visualization.
CI/CD plugin that fails the build if GEO score drops below a threshold.
